entry.title: TouchNet TEST site - Scheduled Maintenance June 26, 2026 - 05:00 a.m. to June 26, 2026 - 05:00 p.m.
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 26, 05:00 - 17:00 PDT

May 26, 12:12 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet TEST site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet TEST site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for making TEST payments.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: UBCIT eSAM Servers Maintenance June 24, 2026, 20:00-22:00 PT
entry.content:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT Jun 24, 20:00 - 22:00 PDT

Jun 4, 11:48 PDT
Scheduled - UBCIT will be performing maintenance on the eSAM component and vault servers on June 24, 2026, 20:00-22:00 PT. This change will affect both UBC campuses.

Users will intermittently not be able to login to any servers managed by eSAM, nor retrieve any credentials via the eSAM Web UI throughout the maintanance window.

Any connections terminated while a component is being rebooted can be reconnected to the secondary node. All connections will be terminated and users won't be able to reconnect while we patch the vault servers (which typically lasts around 30 minutes) during this window.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Monthly Maintenance and Weekly Service Update June 12, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 13, 2026, 04:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 13, 04:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 8, 14:34 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on June 12, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 13, 2026, 04:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its monthly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks
Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.

entry.title: Network system maintenance upgrade June 12, 2026 17:00-22:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 12, 22:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 17:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 12, 14:12 PDT
Scheduled - UBC IT will be performing a scheduled network firewall upgrade on:
Date: June 12, 2026
Time: 17:00 – 22:00 PT
During this maintenance window, you may experience a brief network interruption (less than 1 minute).

entry.title: Eduroam intermittent connection issues - June 11, 2026 - 13:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 12, 08:27 PDT
Resolved - The issue has been resolved

Jun 11, 14:27 PDT
Investigating - UBC affiliated users are having intermittent issues authenticating to Eduroam at multiple Teaching Hospitals in the Lower Mainland. Technicians are aware and investigating.

entry.title: TouchNet PROD site - Scheduled Maintenance June 12, 2026 - 12:00 a.m. to June 12, 2026 - 04:00 a.m.
entry.content:
Jun 12, 04:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 12, 00:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 26, 12:10 PDT
Scheduled - The TouchNet PROD site will be undergoing scheduled maintenance. During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.
For any questions please contact dpp.support@ubc.ca

entry.title: Red Hat Satellite Service Maintenance June 11, 2026, 16:30 PT to June 11, 2026 21:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 21:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 16:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 16:29 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Satellite service will continue to be unavailable until approximately June 11, 2026 21:00 PT.

The Red Hat Satellite service provides errata and software updates to all registered Red Hat Linux systems. The service will be unavailable during the maintenance window. Users will be unable to register systems with the service, install software, or patches hosted by the service.

Satellite Organization administrators should review the release notes to ensure their organization is not adversely affected by API or other changes in functionality:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_satellite/6.17/html/release_notes/index

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Thursday, June 11, 2026 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 17:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 9, 15:16 PDT
Scheduled - On Thursday, June 11, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint on-prem sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: UBC SharePoint Maintenance Thursday, June 11, 2026 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 17:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 09:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 8, 14:56 PDT
Scheduled - On Thursday, June 11, 2026 from 09:00 PT to 17:00 PT, the UBC SharePoint Software as a Service (SaaS) service will be undergoing maintenance. During this maintenance window, SharePoint on-prem sites will be accessible as no interruptions to the service are expected.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 -16:00
entry.content:
Jun 11, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 14:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 11, 09:01 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery services maintenance for Scheduling Activity Transfer from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 -16:00

The EASD Team will be releasing software updates that may affect Scheduling services

During this maintenance window there may be a potential interruption to the apps and services for <30 min (between 14:00 to 16:00)
Release activities will be completed between from Jun 11, 2026 14:00 - 16:00, Validation will continue until 17:00.
Apps/Services:

Bug fixes / Enhancement for Scheduling Activity Transfer
Fix to change a course from Full Term to Single Term in Scientia for it to pick up the appropriate student fee group in WD

Fix to update Joint Teaching Arrangements (JTAs), to ensure JTAs with undergraduate and graduate courses come through CRSS
Impacts:

No other impacts to end users.
Reason for maintenance:

IRP Student: Scheduling Activity Transfer bug fixes

entry.title: Red Hat Satellite Service Maintenance June 11, 2026, 07:30 PT to June 11, 2026 15:30 PT

Jun 11, 15:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 11, 07:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 10, 11:49 PDT
Scheduled - The UBC Satellite service will not be available on June 11, 2026, 07:30 PT to June 11, 2026 15:30 PT due to service maintenance.

The Red Hat Satellite service provides errata and software updates to all registered Red Hat Linux systems. The service will be unavailable during the maintenance window. Users will be unable to register systems with the service, install software, or patches hosted by the service.

Satellite Organization administrators should review the release notes to ensure their organization is not adversely affected by API or other changes in functionality:

https://docs.redhat.com/en/documentation/red_hat_satellite/6.17/html/release_notes/index

entry.title: Okanagan campus phone call quality issue - Wednesday June 10, 2026 12:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 11, 09:50 PDT
Resolved - Technicians performed maintenance to remediate the issue last night which has resolved the issue, and will continue to closely monitor performance throughout the day today.

Jun 10, 13:17 PDT
Identified - Technicians have diagnosed the cause and will be implementing an emergency fix this evening to resolve the issue. Technicians will be monitoring the issue closely through the remainder of the afternoon/evening.

Callers may find brief periods where call quality is degraded. We apologize for any inconvenience.

Jun 10, 12:39 PDT
Investigating - Okanagan campus may be experiencing some Phone call quality issues. Technicians are working on remediating the issue. Next update at 13:15 PT.

entry.title: Exchange Student Residence Network Switch Replacement June 9, 2026 22:00 - June 10, 2026 05:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 10, 05:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 22:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 8, 14:55 PDT
Scheduled - Network maintenance is being performed at the Exchange Student Residence, involving replacement of aging network infrastructure. During this service window from June 9, 2026 22:00 - June 10, 2026 05:00 PT; network services will be interrupted briefly and intermittently while physical and logical changes are being performed on the network backbones and while the user ports are migrated to new switching infrastructure.

entry.title: LTIC Service Maintenance June 9, 2026, 22:00 - June 10, 02:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 10, 02:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 22:01 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 9, 15:13 PDT
Scheduled - Multiple LTIC services may experience brief, intermittent interruptions due to scheduled maintenance on June 9, 2026, 22:00 - June 10, 02:00 PT.

Services affected:
ComPAIR
Hotcrp
iPeer
Moodle
WeBWorK
UBC Wiki

entry.title: Admissions System Maintenance (ADM) Maintenance June 9, 2026, 15:00-18:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 9, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 15:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 19, 11:57 PDT
Scheduled - ADM applications, including Admissions Administrative Portal (AAP), Applicant Service Centre (ASC), Broad-Based Admission (BBA), and Application Server (AS), will be unavailable on June 9, 2026, from 15:00 to 18:00 PT due to a planned server migration.
During this time, staff may not be able to access ADM applications, and students may not be able to log in to the Applicant Service Centre to accept offers, view application statuses, or complete related activities. Students, faculty, and staff are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery APPIAN Cloud Platform Maintenance from June 9, 2026, 04:00 - 16:00 PST
entry.content:
Jun 9, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 9, 04:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 4, 11:54 PDT
Scheduled - Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery (EASD) APPIAN Business Process Management System (BPMS) Cloud Platform Maintenance is scheduled for 09 Jun 2026, 04:00 - 16:00 PST.

During the maintenance window, the UBC Appian site will experience a service interruption of up to two hours 09 Jun 2026 between 04:00 and 06:00 PST.

Validation activities will continue until 16:00 PST on the same day.

All BPMS applications will automatically recover once maintenance is complete.

Impacted applications:

Scheduling Applications:
Special Topics and Variable Credit (STVC)
Standard Time Table (STTM)
Scheduling Menu (SM)
Final Grade Submission (AOC)
Official Documents (ODMT)
Student Direct Stream (SDS)
Document Viewer (DOCV)
Learner Financial Support (LFS)
Role Based Access Control (RBAC)
Student Communications Tool (ADHC)
Course Management (CRSS)
Academic Records (AARS)
Affiliate Student Management Tool (ASMT)
Scheduling Transfers (SCHT)
Custom Organization Management System (COMS)
Exam Management (EXMM)
Integration Error Log (ERRL)
Record Queue Manager (RQM)
TeachEval (SET)
Graduation Management (CNVM)
Automation Services

The Red Hat Satellite service provides errata and software updates to all registered Red Hat Linux systems. The service will be unavailable during the maintenance window. Users will be unable to register systems with the service, install software, or patches hosted by the service.

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for Graduation Management Application 08 Jun 2026 10:00 PT - 08 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 8, 18:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 8, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 4, 11:52 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Graduation Management Application will undergo maintenance from 08 Jun 2026 from 10:00 and validation until 08 Jun 2026 16:00

Apps/Services:

Bug fixes for Graduation Management Application (CNVM-Appian)
To fix a bug that prevent student from editing existing graduation application page due to duplicated programs
To fix a bug that program completion status affect student's ability to create graduation application.
Impacts:

During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 08 Jun 2026 from 12:00 - 12:30) to the apps and services listed above.
Impacted Services:

ubc-iec--appian-web-graduation-management-application--1

entry.title: Enterprise Automation & Solution Delivery service maintenance for Graduation Management Application 08 Jun 2026 10:00 PT - 08 Jun 2026 16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 8, 16:01 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 8, 10:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 4, 09:56 PDT
Scheduled - The Enterprise Automation and Solution Delivery (EASD) Graduation Management Application will undergo maintenance from 08 Jun 2026 from 10:00 and validation until 08 Jun 2026 16:00

Apps/Services:
Bug fixes for Graduation Management Application (CNVM-Appian)
• To fix a bug that prevent student from editing existing graduation application page due to duplicated programs
• To fix a bug that program completion status affect student's ability to create graduation application.
Impacts:
During this maintenance there may be a brief interruption (from 08 Jun 2026 from 12:00 - 12:30) to the apps and services listed above.

entry.title: Perceptive Content and Document Viewer Maintenance June 8, 2026, 08:30–16:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 8, 16:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 8, 08:30 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

May 19, 11:55 PDT
Scheduled - Perceptive Content or ImageNow, and Document Viewer will be unavailable on June 8, 2026, from 08:30 to 16:00 PT due to a planned server migration. During this time, users will not be able to access Perceptive Content or view documents, including transcripts, through the Document Viewer application in Workday. Admissions staff and other users are advised to plan accordingly.

entry.title: UBC Vancouver Contact Centre Intermittent Audio Issues June 5, 2026
entry.content:
Jun 8, 10:16 PDT
Resolved - The service has been stable through the weekend and the issue is now resolved.

Jun 5, 18:58 PDT
Monitoring - UBC IT technicians have identified the root cause and have corrected the issue.

Service has been restored and we will continue to monitor through the weekend.

Jun 5, 17:59 PDT
Identified - Our technicians have identified the issue and are now testing the Contact Centre systems to confirm that normal services can be restored.

Jun 5, 12:37 PDT
Update - UBC Vancouver Contact Centre users may be experiencing intermittent audio issues.

When the issue occurs, the incoming callers are not able to hear the Contact Centre agent.

UBC IT suggests that if incoming calls are impacted by this issue, Contact Centre agents should disconnect the call and call them back.

Technicians are working with the respective vendors on a resolution.

We will provide our next update at 17:30 PT.

Jun 5, 10:08 PDT
Investigating - Please be advised that UBC Vancouver Contact Centre users may be experiencing intermittent audio issues. The main symptom includes the incoming caller not being able to hear the contact centre agent. Technicians are working with the respective vendors on a resolution

entry.title: Vancouver Campus Network Maintenance Jun 7, 2026, 13:00-23:30 PT
entry.content:
Jun 7, 23:30 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 7, 13:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 2, 13:58 PDT
Scheduled - The Vancouver campus data center network (UDC) will undergo maintenance on Jun 7, 2026, 13:00-23:30 PT.
There will be no impact to users.

During the update window the TouchNet PROD site will be offline for logging in by staff as a TouchNet user and for customers making new payments. During this time when the payor clicks "pay now" TouchNet will display a screen informing the payor that the system is off line for maintenance and to try again after the system is back online.

entry.title: Workday Scheduled Weekly Maintenance June 05, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 06, 2026, 00:00 PT
entry.content:
Jun 6, 00:00 PDT
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Jun 5, 21:00 PDT
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Jun 2, 09:10 PDT
Scheduled - Please be advised that on June 05, 2026, 21:00 PT to June 06, 2026, 00:00 PT, Workday will be undergoing scheduled maintenance as part of its weekly service update. The system will remain accessible during the scheduled maintenance period but it is advised not to run critical processes and tasks.

Learn about Workday Support at UBC and other available resources on isc.ubc.ca.
